title: Members
subtitle: Find neighbours, skills, shared interests, and trusted timebank members.
filtersIntro: Search by name, profile text, or local member details.

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitle: Manage your member connections, pending requests, and direct-message routes.

accepted.title: No connections yet
accepted.description: Find members and send connection requests.

pending_received.title: No requests to review
pending_received.description: Incoming connection requests will appear here.

pending_sent.title: No sent requests
pending_sent.description: Connection requests you send will appear here until they are accepted.

profile.ownProfileHint: Keep your profile fresh so other members know what you can offer and what you are interested in.
profile.noBio: This member has not added a bio yet.
profile.noBioOwn: Add a short bio so other members know how to connect with you.
profile.signInRequired: Sign in to view your profile.
profile.federatedProfileHint: This profile is shared from {{community}} through the federation network.
profile.externalFederatedMemberDescription: This member is shared by an external federation partner. You can start a federated message, but the full profile remains on the partner system.
profile.externalFederatedTrustHint: Partner-provided reviews appear here when the federation partner shares them.
profile.transferAmountRequired: Enter a whole-hour amount between 1 and 100.
profile.transferDescriptionRequired: Add a description for this transfer.
profile.transferFailedMessage: Please check federation exchanges are enabled and try again.
profile.loadError: Could not load member profile. Please try again.
profile.trustStatusHint: Verification labels are loaded from the member verification system.
profile.federatedTrustHint: Federated trust details are shared by the partner community when available.
profile.appreciationsHint: Read public thank-you notes shared with {{name}}.
profile.collectionsOwnHint: Organise the posts, listings, events, groups, jobs, resources, and marketplace items you save.

collections.mySubtitle: Organise saved items into reusable collections.
collections.publicSubtitle: Browse collections this member has shared publicly.
collections.name: Name
collections.emptyMineSubtitle: Create a collection to organise saved items.
collections.emptyPublicSubtitle: Public collections will appear here when this member shares them.
collections.emptyItemsSubtitle: Saved items will appear here after this collection is used.
collections.removeFailed: Could not remove that saved item.

appreciations.wallSubtitle: Public thank-you notes and reactions from the community.
appreciations.emptySubtitle: Thank-you notes will appear here when members share them publicly.
appreciations.signInMessage: Reactions are available after you sign in.

empty.title: No members found
empty.subtitle: Try adjusting your search or filters
